use_when: Generate an index from Markdown YAML frontmatter as CSV, a Markdown table, or an extensible Markdown list
excludes: Validating or formatting Markdown without generating an index

use_when: Validate YAML frontmatter keys, values, types, lengths, lists, or nesting in markdown files
excludes: Reviewing markdown headers, links, formatting, or creating new files

use_when: Validate markdown heading structure, ensuring only one H1 and sequential levels
excludes: Reviewing frontmatter, links, formatting, or creating new files

use_when: Validate markdown link syntax and targets, checking internal fragments/references
excludes: Reviewing frontmatter, headers, formatting, or creating new files

use_when: Format markdown files applying lint fixes and formatting rules via rumdl
excludes: Only validating files without modifying them, or generating new templates

use_when: Request help, overview, or usage instructions for this markdown skill
excludes: Running specific validations or formatting files directly
